data.title: Oklo, NuScale Stocks Rally On US Space Nuclear Power Initiative
data.description: Shares of innovative nuclear technology companies Oklo Inc. (NYSE: OKLO) and NuScale Power Corp. (NYSE: SMR) saw significant increases in value on Wednesday in response to the U.S. government's announcement of a comprehensive program to advance nuclear energy technology in space. The initiative, known as the National Initiative for American Space Nuclear Power (NSTM-3), is a collaborative effort between NASA and the Pentagon aiming to develop nuclear power systems capable of supporting upcoming lunar and interplanetary missions. As part of this initiative, a 20-kilowatt electric (kWe) space reactor named "SR-1 Freedom" is being designed for interplanetary propulsion and surface power. The program includes plans for an in-orbit demonstration by 2028 and the installation of a functional reactor for space use. This groundbreaking development has garnered official endorsement from NASA and is set to revolutionize nuclear power in space exploration. For more details, visit Benzinga.com for the complete story.

data.title: Lautenbach Recycling to Celebrate Earth Day with Grand Opening of Bellingham Facility
data.description: The city of Bellingham in Washington will witness a significant event on April 22nd, 2026, as Lautenbach Recycling plans to commemorate Earth Day with a ribbon-cutting ceremony at 3:30 p.m. Following this, a community open house will be held from 4:00 p.m. to 6:00 p.m. The celebration will take place at the new facility located at 2885 E. Bakerview Road. This event signifies a crucial step in promoting environmental sustainability and community engagement.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Service Compression/
data.description: Service Compression has recently completed the acquisition of Axip Energy Services, as announced in a news release dated April 15, 2026. The acquisition was disclosed by Service Compression through PR Newswire. Following this acquisition, significant changes have been implemented by the company. Additional details regarding this acquisition can be found at the end of the revised release.

data.title: Contractor Forced to Pay $200,000 in Back Pay For Violating St. Louis County Prevailing Wage Law
data.description: In connection with the investigation, the Mid-America Carpenters Regional Council collaborated on the case in St. Louis. Recently, it was revealed that a contractor involved in the restoration of the Creve Coeur Park Soccer Complex project was obligated to compensate approximately $200,000 in back wages. This incident took place in St. Louis County on April 15, 2026.

data.title: Skreens Introduces Adaptive Channel Infrastructure (ACI) Creating a New Model for Personalized Live Sports Video Delivery for Content Providers and MVPDs
data.description: Today in Boston, Skreens introduced the integration of its Tessera™ platform onto the Adaptive Channel Infrastructure (ACI), a cutting-edge live video technology that revolutionizes standard fixed linear channels into AI-enhanced personalized viewing experiences. This update signifies a significant development for Skreens’ Tessera™ platform, shifting from exclusive sports multiview services to a comprehensive AI-powered system that can create live channels instantaneously. This advancement allows for the creation of personalized viewing experiences in real time.

data.title: Mission: Launch Convenes Cross Sector Partners for Bank on 100 Million Miami Hackathon in Miami
data.description: On April 15, 2026, national leaders in reentry initiatives gathered in Miami to discuss and promote implementable strategies for workforce development. The event, taking place at St. Thomas University School of Law on April 22–23, 2026, brought together a diverse group including community members, policy experts, correctional officers, and technology innovators. The focus was on fostering practical and scalable solutions to boost employment opportunities for individuals returning to society post-incarceration. The collaborative effort aimed to address the challenges faced by this population and create meaningful impact.

data.title: HyOrc successfully verifies waste-to-methanol platform through independent process and technology validation.
data.description: In a recent update, it has been reported that the number of new COVID-19 cases has reached a record high of over 200,000 in a single day. This surge has intensified concerns about the spread of the virus, with the total number of confirmed cases now exceeding 10 million globally. The death toll has also risen, surpassing 500,000 worldwide. Health officials are urging the public to continue following safety measures such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing to help curb further transmission of the virus. The situation remains fluid, and experts are closely monitoring the data to track the progression of the pandemic.
